text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! As I expected, this is tough!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It looks like my clothing wasn't able to
withstand my extraordinary skill!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My calculations would attribute the cause to an
increase in your weight. Based on your recent
calorie intake and your movement velocity, I
estimate that—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not it! My abilities are just beyond the
norm, that's all, so it's not something you can just
calculate!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is incorrect. A simple calculation with all
values present would serve as proof.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you won't get the point, let's decide it with a
race! The winner is the one who is right!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Exercise would add in more verifiable integers.
...Affirmative. Executing verification measures.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the showdown of the two racers unfurled
over the course of a few days...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Bourbon! Today will be the day we decide the
winner!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All calculations complete... A reduction in weight
should have alleviated the feeling of tightness of
your uniform.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Now that you mention it, it has felt a bit
looser while running these past few days...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see! My uniform has grown! Was it my
running that caused it to change?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So I was right after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the reason, Sakura Bakushin O's diet
proves to be a success.
